_comment: Large model artifacts kept out of git. Fetched at container startup by src/api/model_loader.py. Host these files anywhere reachable over HTTPS (Appwrite Storage, S3, R2, GCS). Set the per-file URL via the env var named in 'url_env', or set MODEL_BASE_URL so each file resolves to '<MODEL_BASE_URL>/<filename>'. Small artifacts (encoder, feat_eng, stage1, etc.) ship in the image and are not listed here.
